instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall protect the system when oil temperature exceeds safe operating limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable gear shifting when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Max_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Max_Temp THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Warning_Temp THEN Activate_Temp_Warning
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Activate_Thermal_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate thermal protection when oil temperature becomes excessive.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger protection mode when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Critical_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Critical_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Disabled
IF Protection_Mode = Enabled THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Emergency_Temp THEN Activate_Emergency_Protection
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall generate warnings when oil temperature reaches warning limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate temperature warning when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Warning_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Warning_Temp THEN Activate_Temp_Warning
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Warning_Temp THEN Clear_Temp_Warning
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Activate_Diagnostic_Flag
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall reduce shift activity when oil temperature rises.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay gear shifts when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Thermal_Control_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Thermal_Control_Temp THEN Delay_Shift_Request
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Thermal_Control_Temp THEN Allow_Shift_Request
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear shifts during extreme temperature conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear shifts when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Critical_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Critical_Temp THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Emergency_Temp THEN Activate_Emergency_Shutdown
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Warning_Temp THEN Activate_Temp_Warning

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate cooling strategies when oil temperature rises.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable cooling mode when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Cooling_Trigger_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Cooling_Trigger_Temp THEN Cooling_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Cooling_Trigger_Temp THEN Cooling_Mode = Disabled
IF Cooling_Mode = Enabled THEN Reduce_Shift_Frequency
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Cooling_Mode = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall protect internal components from overheating.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate thermal protection when oil temperature exceeds the safety threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Safety_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled
IF Protection_Mode = Enabled THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Safety_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Activate_Thermal_Shutdown
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restrict gear operation when oil temperature becomes unstable.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall limit shift operations when Transmission_Oil_Temp fluctuates beyond stability limits.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Stability_Limit THEN Limit_Shift_Operations
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Stability_Limit THEN Normal_Shift_Operation
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Limit_Shift_Operations
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Activate_Protection_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe operation during moderate overheating.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reduce gear shifting when oil temperature exceeds Moderate_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Moderate_Temp THEN Reduce_Shift_Frequency
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Moderate_Temp THEN Normal_Shift_Frequency
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Activate_Thermal_Protection
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reduce_Shift_Frequency

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable shifting during emergency temperature conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear shifts when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Emergency_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Emergency_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Emergency_Temp THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Emergency_Temp THEN Trigger_System_Alert

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate diagnostic flags during temperature anomalies.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall generate a fault code when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds diagnostic threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Diagnostic_Temp THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Diagnostic_Temp THEN Clear_Diagnostic_Code
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall limit performance during high oil temperature conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall restrict gear operation when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Performance_Limit_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Performance_Limit_Temp THEN Limit_Transmission_Performance
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Performance_Limit_Temp THEN Normal_Transmission_Performance
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Activate_Thermal_Protection
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Limit_Transmission_Performance

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall trigger alarms when oil temperature approaches dangerous limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate an alarm when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Alarm_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Alarm_Temp THEN Activate_Alarm
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Alarm_Temp THEN Deactivate_Alarm
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Activate_Alarm

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall reduce load during overheating conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reduce torque load when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Torque_Reduction_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Torque_Reduction_Temp THEN Reduce_Torque_Load
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Torque_Reduction_Temp THEN Normal_Torque_Load
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Activate_Protection_Mode
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reduce_Torque_Load

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enter protection mode when oil temperature rises beyond safe operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable protection mode when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Protection_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Protection_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Protection_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Disabled
IF Protection_Mode = Enabled THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Emergency_Temp THEN Activate_Emergency_Shutdown
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent operation during extreme thermal events.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall stop gear operation when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Shutdown_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Shutdown_Temp THEN Disable_Transmission_Operation
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Shutdown_Temp THEN Enable_Transmission_Operation
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Activate_Protection_Mode
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Disable_Transmission_Operation
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Shutdown_Temp THEN Trigger_System_Shutdown

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall regulate shift commands during overheating.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall restrict shift commands when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Shift_Limit_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Shift_Limit_Temp THEN Restrict_Shift_Commands
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Shift_Limit_Temp THEN Normal_Shift_Commands
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Restrict_Shift_Commands

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall trigger fail-safe operation during severe overheating.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate fail-safe mode when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds FailSafe_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > FailSafe_Temp THEN FailSafe_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= FailSafe_Temp THEN FailSafe_Mode = Disabled
IF FailSafe_Mode = Enabled THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Emergency_Temp THEN Activate_Emergency_Shutdown
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN FailSafe_Mode = Enabled
